headline: Q1 Earnings Highs And Lows: DaVita (NYSE:DVA) Vs The Rest Of The Outpatient & Specialty Care Stocks
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q1. Today, we are looking at outpatient & specialty care stocks, starting with DaVita (NYSE:DVA).

headline: Akebia Therapeutics Sees Vafseo Uptake Rising as Access and Pipeline Milestones Near
summary: Akebia Therapeutics (NASDAQ:AKBA) outlined its commercial priorities for Vafseo, the expected evolution of reimbursement after the TDAPA period and several renal-disease pipeline programs during a fireside chat at the Jefferies 2026 Global Healthcare Conference.
